x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Service Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents services that enable money movement between accounts or parties

Comment:
Example:
Direct Debit, Wire Transfer

x-enumeration-literals.name: Digital Banking Service Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents access channels and digital platforms for banking interaction

Comment:
Example:
Mobile Banking, eBranch Access

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Support Service Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents assistance services that support customer interactions and issue handling

Comment:
Example: Contact Center, Customer Wrokbench

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance and Security Service Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents controls ensuring regulatory compliance and transaction security

Comment:
Example: AML monitoring, Amount Block

x-enumeration-literals.name: Trade Finance Service Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents services supporting international trade and guarantees

Comment:
Example: Letter of credit, bank guarantee

x-enumeration-literals.name: Treasury Service Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents operational services for liquidity, cash, and funding management

Comment:
Example: sweep arrangement, cash management

x-enumeration-literals.name: Card Service Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents operational services enabling card usage

Comment:
Example: Authorization service, ATM withdrawal service

x-enumeration-literals.name: Notification Service Entry
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents communication services that inform customers about events or changes

Comment:
Example: SMS alerts, email notifications
